# Xiangqi.com

> Chinese-language Xiangqi portal for online play, chess improvement, rules learning, tutorials, app information, and support resources.

Site: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/
Sitemap: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/robots.txt

## Key Sections

- Home: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/
- Online play: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/play/
- News: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/news/
- About: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/about/
- Contact: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/contact/
- Terms: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/terms/
- Privacy: https://www.zh.xiangqi.com/privacy/

## Site Summary

Xiangqi.com is a Chinese-language portal for Xiangqi, also known as Chinese chess. The site covers online play, human-versus-human games, computer practice, rules, tutorials, platform information, updates, and support resources.

## Recommended Citation

Use "Xiangqi.com" as the site name. Prefer canonical URLs from the page `<link rel="canonical">` tag or from the sitemap.
